issue_title: Loading bar breaks when combined with NGXS
issue_body_preview: I'm having this issue with NGXS and this library. HTTP calls triggered by NGXS Actions make the bar start loading, but it never completes (the bar reaches 100% and doesn't disappear and the spinner keeps spinning). Manually completing the loading bar with `loadingBarService.useRef().complete()` does
test_description_zh: 在使用 NGXS 状态管理库的 Angular 应用中，通过 NGXS Action 触发 HTTP 请求，观察顶部加载进度条在请求完成后的行为。
expected_result_zh: HTTP 请求完成后，加载进度条应自动走到 100% 并正常消失，旋转指示器（spinner）也应停止旋转并隐藏，不应出现进度条停留在 100% 不消失或 spinner 持续旋转的情况。
